prestazioni: Engine swap to Fiat Multiair Turbo 1.7L (GSE T4) with a custom BorgWarner EFR 7670 turbocharger (0.83 A/R, 62mm inducer) paired with a PTP Turbo 3.5" stainless steel downpipe and a custom 3.5" straight-pipe exhaust system featuring a MagnaFlow 14815 muffler for aggressive tone without drone. Supporting mods include a Radium Engineering fuel surge tank, Injector Dynamics ID1050x injectors, and a custom ECU tune via HP Tuners with a 22psi peak boost target on 93 octane.

Full suspension overhaul using Öhlins Road & Track DFV coilovers (custom valved for the Renegade Trailhawk’s 5x110 bolt pattern) with Eibach Pro-Kit helper springs for improved articulation. Front and rear sway bars replaced with Hotchkis 1.25" adjustable units, paired with Polyurethane Energy Suspension bushings (part #4.1104G) to eliminate slop in the subframe and control arms.

Drivetrain reinforcement with a Quaife ATB helical LSD (part #QDF7Y) in the front axle, paired with a custom 4.10:1 gear ratio swap in the 9-speed ZF 9HP48 transmission. The transfer case is upgraded with a custom 40% front / 60% rear torque split via a Jeep Performance Parts (JPP) T-case controller, and the driveshafts are replaced with custom CV-style units from Tom Wood’s Custom Driveshafts (3.5" diameter, 4340 chromoly).
estetica: Custom widebody conversion using a Liberty Walk LB Works Renegade Trailhawk kit (fiberglass fenders, front/rear bumpers, and side skirts) with a 2.5" extended wheelbase for aggressive stance. The kit is finished in a custom matte military green (PPG DCC9929) with satin black accents on the fender flares and lower cladding.

Wheel setup featuring custom 17x9.5" ET15 Method MR701 VT-Spec wheels (5x110, +30mm offset) wrapped in 255/70R17 BFGoodrich KM3 tires (35" diameter) for a 1.5" lift over stock. The rear fenders are rolled and pulled using a Eastwood fender roller and a Harbor Freight 2-ton come-along for maximum tire clearance without trimming.

Aerodynamic and functional upgrades including a custom carbon fiber hood (Renegade-specific, sourced from Seibon) with a 3" cowl scoop for engine bay cooling, a custom front splitter from RPM Fabrication (3M 1080 vinyl wrap in satin black) with integrated air curtains, and a custom rear diffuser from 3D Carbon (fiberglass, painted to match the body). Additional details include a custom LED light bar integrated into the front bumper (Rigid Industries SR-M 50" curved bar) and a custom roof rack from Front Runner Outfitters (slimline II, powder-coated matte black).
